title: Bitdeer Technologies Group (BTDR) Q4 2024 Earnings Preview
text: Bitdeer Technologies Group (NASDAQ:BTDR) had Q4 2024 earnings release scheduled for February 25, 2025. Q4 2024 consensus estimates included revenue of $0.07 billion and EPS of -$0.21 per share. Full year 2024 projections showed revenue of $0.35 billion with EPS of -$0.66 per share. Over the past 90 days, analyst expectations shifted meaningfully. Full-year 2024 revenue estimates decreased slightly from $0.36 billion, while 2025 projections improved substantially from $0.52 billion to $0.66 billion. Earnings forecasts for 2025 turned positive, rising from breakeven to $0.32 per share. In Q3 2024, the company reported revenue of $0.06 billion, falling short of the $0.08 billion forecast. More significantly, actual losses of -$0.35 per share dramatically exceeded the anticipated -$0.08 per share loss. The stock responded positively with a 6.85% single-day gain following the announcement. Wall Street maintains an Outperform consensus with an average rating of 1.9 across 12 firms. Price target estimates range from $9.00 to $39.00, averaging $23.90, suggesting potential 82.56% upside from current levels.
